definitions.translation: to understand how a matter is developing

examples.no: hun vil vente og se hvilken vei vinden blåser
examples.en: she wants to wait and see which way the wind blows

examples.no: han vet hvilken vei vinden blåser
examples.en: he knows which way the wind blows

examples.no: det ble tydelig hvilken vei vinden blåste
examples.en: it became clear which way the wind was blowing
